homelandscapes6x17about

Hello, I'm David. I like to take photographs in my free time. I try to spend as much time outside as possible, hence its mostly landscape photographs. The photographs on this site were taken with a variety of cameras. Most of them analog.

Most of my photographs are taken around Switzerland. A few are from Scandinavia or further away (From me at least :P). In my day job, I work as a DevOps Engineer in Switzerland. This site serves two purposes. Firstly, it is meant as a replacement for my old Instagram account, which I do not maintain anymore. I have better ways to spend my time, than doomscrolling through that misbegotten app. The second use, is as a sort of photographic diary for myself to have my favorite shots in one place. There are dedicated tools for this, but I don't care.

Currently, I use the following kit:

  • Chamonix F2 4x5 with the following lenses:
    • Fujinon 90mm
    • Nikkor 180mm
    • Nikkor 360mm
  • Bronica SQ
  • Olympus XA
  • Fujifilm X100F

A few books I like for various reasons, in no particular order:

  • The Lord of the Rings, J.R.R. Tolkien
  • Wie der Berg zu seinem Namen kam, Andrea Schorta
  • Dune, Frank Herbert
  • The Complete Robot, Isaac Asimov
  • Die Zürcher Bibel
  • The Wheel of Time Series, Robert Jordan
  • Utvandrarna, Vilhelm Moberg
